Description.SourceString:
Duneday

Ulgo made friends with man in the woods. Could not see face but they were very friendly. Made lots of pretty noises at Ulgo, though Ulgo does not know their words.

Tomorrow Ulgo is going to go and see if they want to play catch with him. Papa says that everyone loves playing catch, even though the villagers need to stand very far away so that the ball does not hurt them.

Threw stone once, because had no ball, and villager wouldn’t talk to me again after. Ulgo very sad. Villager never spoken to Ulgo again, so Ulgo cannot even say sorry.

Twiblick

Ulgo’s friend was in the woods again. Got a better look at him, his skin was all shiny and special. Maybe he got paints? Ulgo will ask Papa if he can get paints.

Friend in wood played very rough. When Ulgo threw him the ball, he did not throw it back. Instead he ran at Ulgo and tried to wrestle. Ulgo only ten, but Ulgo very strong, Papa always says so, and Ulgo push friend away.

Fun game. Laughed a lot. Even though new friend bit me a few times. Must have gotten overexcited. Ulgo understand, Ulgo bite too.

Ivanday

Ulgo hungry. Feel slow and strange. Need to eat more. Maybe Mama make Ulgo something.

Duneday

Ulgo hungry. Papa’s arm taste bad.

Notduneday

Ulgo hungry.

Day

Ulgo hungry.
